{{Quote|My partner and I deal in very rare and powerful items. Weapons, armor: things you could use in your battles against Malak and the Sith.|translated=1|Ziagrom to Revan|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Ziagrom''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] green [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] businessman [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] met in [[Dreshdae]], [[3956 BBY]]. He was [[Mika Dorin]]'s partner. Through several contacts he had in the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]], he subsequently learned of the amnesiac Revan's true identity as the former [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Revan. He told Revan to tell Dorin he had sent him and that Dorin would sell him his premium items.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
